summary: Tested 5 new changes: 1) Tracking link shows start date in Turkey time (started_at_tr), 2) Management panel operator selection dialog, 3) Link copy button on active jobs, 4) Live Dashboard password protection, 5) Operators list API. All 11 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: 5 new features fully tested and working: 1) Tracking page /takip/:token shows started_at_tr in Turkish format (e.g., '09 Nisan 2026, 22:21') instead of delivery_date. Invalid tokens show error 'Bu takip linki geçersiz veya süresi dolmuş.' 2) Management panel operator selection dialog opens when starting a job - has dropdown with existing operators (Ali Operatör, Emrecan, Ali) + free text input for custom operator name. 3) Link copy button (Link2 icon) visible on active jobs in machine detail dialog. 4) Live Dashboard at /dashboard requires password 'buse4' - wrong password shows 'Yanlış şifre' error, correct password shows dashboard. Session saved in sessionStorage. 5) GET /api/operators/list returns list of active operators with id and name fields.

details: GET /api/takip/{token} returns started_at_tr in Turkey time format
GET /api/takip/{token} does NOT return delivery_date anymore
Invalid token shows error message in Turkish
Starting a job from management panel opens 'İş Başlat' dialog
Dialog has 'Operatör Seç' dropdown with existing operators
Dropdown shows 3 operators: Ali Operatör, Emrecan, Ali
Dialog has 'veya İsim Yaz' free text input for custom operator name
Dialog has 'İşi Başlat' button to confirm
Link2 copy button visible on active jobs in machine detail dialog
Clicking copies tracking URL to clipboard
Dashboard at /dashboard shows password login screen
Session saved in sessionStorage for persistence
Response is array of operators with id and name fields
Returns active operators: Ali Operatör, Emrecan, Ali
